// ==== KoineRuntime.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
// Koine PHP runtime: shared domain primitives, emitted once.
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Runtime;

use \InvalidArgumentException;
use \RuntimeException;

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant or illegal state transition is violated.
 */
class DomainInvariantViolationException extends RuntimeException
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $typeName,
        public readonly string $rule,
    ) {
        parent::__construct("Invariant violated on {$typeName}: {$rule}");
    }
}

/**
 * Thrown when an optimistic-concurrency version check fails on a versioned aggregate.
 */
class ConcurrencyConflictException extends RuntimeException
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $typeName,
        public readonly int $expected,
        public readonly int $actual,
    ) {
        parent::__construct(
            "Concurrency conflict on {$typeName}: expected version {$expected}, was {$actual}"
        );
    }
}

/**
 * A closed interval [start, end] over an orderable value, with containment and overlap.
 *
 * The comparator is optional: when absent the default PHP comparison operators (`<`, `<=`)
 * are used, which work for int, float, and string. Supply a callable(mixed,mixed):int
 * (negative / zero / positive) for custom ordering, e.g. on value objects.
 *
 * @template T
 */
class Range
{
    /** @param T $start
     * @param T $end
     * @param (callable(T,T):int)|null $comparator
     */
    public function __construct(
        public readonly mixed $start,
        public readonly mixed $end,
        private readonly mixed $comparator = null,
    ) {
        if ($this->cmp($start, $end) > 0) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                'Range',
                'start must be less than or equal to end',
            );
        }
    }

    /** @param T $a @param T $b */
    private function cmp(mixed $a, mixed $b): int
    {
        if ($this->comparator !== null) {
            return ($this->comparator)($a, $b);
        }
        return $a <=> $b;
    }

    /** Returns true when $value lies within [start, end] inclusive.
     * @param T $value
     */
    public function contains(mixed $value): bool
    {
        return $this->cmp($value, $this->start) >= 0
            && $this->cmp($value, $this->end) <= 0;
    }

    /** Returns true when this range shares at least one point with $other.
     * @param Range<T> $other
     */
    public function overlaps(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->cmp($this->start, $other->end) <= 0
            && $this->cmp($other->start, $this->end) <= 0;
    }
}

/**
 * A string-backed arbitrary-precision decimal value (no float).
 *
 * Arithmetic delegates to PHP's BCMath extension (bcadd, bcsub, bcmul, bcdiv).
 * The scale (number of decimal places) defaults to 10; supply a higher value for
 * use-cases that demand finer precision.
 */
class Decimal
{
    private string $value;

    public function __construct(string|int $value, private readonly int $scale = 10)
    {
        if (!is_numeric((string)$value)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Invalid Decimal value: {$value}");
        }
        $this->value = (string)$value;
    }

    public function getValue(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }

    public function add(self $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcadd($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function sub(self $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcsub($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function mul(self $other): self
    {
        return new self(bcmul($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function div(self $other): self
    {
        if (bccomp($other->value, '0', $this->scale) === 0) {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException('Decimal', 'division by zero');
        }
        return new self(bcdiv($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale), $this->scale);
    }

    public function compareTo(self $other): int
    {
        return bccomp($this->value, $other->value, $this->scale);
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->compareTo($other) === 0;
    }

    public function __toString(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }
}

// ==== composer.json ====
{
    "name": "koine/generated",
    "description": "Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.",
    "type": "library",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "Koine\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "sort-packages": true
    }
}

// ==== phpstan.neon ====
# <auto-generated/>
parameters:
    level: max
    paths:
        - src

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/Money.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A monetary amount in a currency. Never negative. */
final class Money
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly \Koine\Runtime\Decimal $amount,
        public readonly string $currency
    ) {
        if ($amount < 0) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Money", "an amount cannot be negative");
        }
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->amount->equals($other->amount)
            && $this->currency === $other->currency;
    }

    public function multipliedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self(
            $this->amount->mul($factor),
            $this->currency
        );
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/OrderLine.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A line of an order; its subtotal is derived (unit price scaled by quantity). */
final class OrderLine
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly string $product,
        public readonly int $quantity,
        public readonly Money $unitPrice
    ) {
        if ($quantity < 1) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("OrderLine", "a line needs at least one unit");
        }
    }

    public function subtotal(): Money
    {
        return ($this->unitPrice * $this->quantity);
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->product === $other->product
            && $this->quantity === $other->quantity
            && $this->unitPrice === $other->unitPrice;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/SalePeriod.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A bookable window over time (exercises Range<Instant>). */
final class SalePeriod
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly Range $window
    ) {
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->window === $other->window;
    }
}

// ==== src/Sales/ValueObjects/Weight.php ====
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ValueObjects;

/** A measured weight: an amount in a unit. Quantities of different units cannot be combined. */
final class Weight
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly \Koine\Runtime\Decimal $amount,
        public readonly MassUnit $unit
    ) {
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->amount->equals($other->amount)
            && $this->unit === $other->unit;
    }

    public function add(self $other): self
    {
        if ($this->unit !== $other->unit) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Weight", "cannot add quantities of different units");
        }
        return new self($this->amount->add($other->amount), $this->unit);
    }

    public function subtract(self $other): self
    {
        if ($this->unit !== $other->unit) {
            throw new \Koine\Runtime\DomainInvariantViolationException("Weight", "cannot subtract quantities of different units");
        }
        return new self($this->amount->sub($other->amount), $this->unit);
    }

    public function multipliedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self($this->amount->mul($factor), $this->unit);
    }

    public function dividedBy(\Koine\Runtime\Decimal $factor): self
    {
        return new self($this->amount->div($factor), $this->unit);
    }
}
